title: Cool Wool
description: A clean and smooth wool texture pack that enhances all wool colors while keeping the vanilla Minecraft style. Perfect for building, PvP, and creative worlds.
body: This Wool Texture Pack gives Minecraft wool blocks a fresh and refined look while keeping the classic vanilla style. Each wool color is retextured with smoother patterns and clearer tones, making builds look more vibrant and detailed. Perfect for builders, PvP maps, and creative worlds, this pack improves visuals without changing the original Minecraft feel.
